title: Hanuman — Sanjeevani Parvat
concept: Reference-grade epic: one grand illustration per beat, a single gold flash-word per beat, beat-locked flash cuts. Dramatic retelling of Hanuman lifting the whole Dronagiri mountain → devotional payoff → soft Archana CTA.

music.mood: epic devotional tension, taiko + strings, rises to climax

art_style: vibrant devotional Hindu mythology poster art, deities as RADIANT divine beings (Lord Hanuman as golden vanara with halo + crown + tail, Lord Rama blue-skinned), bright saturated jewel colors, luminous HIGH-KEY lighting (NOT dark, NOT moody), glowing divine aura, ornate gold, clean ultra sharp, bold single subject filling frame, intense expressive emotion, god rays, larger-than-life, eye-catching, 9:16 vertical, no text
art_direction_note: LESSON: dark/deep-shadow/cinematic-painterly = muted arthouse = WRONG for devotional. Audience wants BRIGHT, VIBRANT, GODLY, clear, emotional, catchy (calendar-art energy). Always say 'Lord Hanuman/Rama' + divine + bright, never 'dark'.

segments.voice_hi: रात का आख़िरी पहर — और लक्ष्मण की साँसें थम रही थीं।
segments.illustration_prompt: Lakshmana lying mortally wounded on a dark battlefield at night, Rama kneeling over him in grief and torchlight, vast army silhouettes behind, embers in the air

segments.voice_hi: सूरज उगने से पहले अगर संजीवनी बूटी न मिली — तो सब ख़त्म।
segments.illustration_prompt: a single glowing magical sanjeevani herb radiating golden light on a dark Himalayan mountainside, mist, sacred glow, dramatic

segments.voice_hi: हनुमान पर्वत तक पहुँचे — पर बूटी पहचानना नामुमकिन था।
segments.illustration_prompt: Hanuman standing on a towering moonlit Himalayan mountain peak at night, countless glowing herbs scattered everywhere, confused determined expression, cape of clouds, vast scale

segments.voice_hi: तो बजरंगबली ने पूरा का पूरा पर्वत — उठा लिया।
segments.illustration_prompt: colossal Hanuman lifting an entire glowing Himalayan mountain over his head with one hand, flying through a stormy night sky, moonlight, god rays bursting, embers, epic larger-than-life heroic pose

segments.voice_hi: सूरज उगा भी नहीं — और लक्ष्मण को जीवन मिल गया। ये है भक्ति की शक्ति।
segments.illustration_prompt: Lakshmana awakening healed in golden dawn light, Rama embracing Hanuman with tears of gratitude, warm sunrise rays, divine glow, emotional

segments.voice_hi: ऐसी ही हनुमान कृपा अपने नाम से पाना चाहते हो — तो एक बार माय अर्चना डॉट इन देख लेना।
segments.illustration_prompt: majestic serene portrait of Hanuman glowing with divine golden aura against a temple at sunrise, calm powerful, devotional, rays of light
